sections.title: Appendices
learningObjectives: Identify the supplemental resources included in the Appendices.
Locate and access each form or reference document quickly via its hyperlink.
Understand the purpose of each appendix item (e.g., admission forms, review forms, referral forms, bibliography).

subsections.title: Bibliography/References
subsections.description: List of cited works and reference material used throughout the document.

subsections.title: Neonatal Admission Form
subsections.description: Standard admission worksheet for neonatal patients.

subsections.title: Paediatric Admission Form
subsections.description: Standard admission worksheet for paediatric patients.

subsections.title: Neonatal CCP Form
subsections.description: Critical Care Pathway form specific to neonatal cases.

subsections.title: Neonatal Death Review Form
subsections.description: Form used to review and analyse neonatal mortality events.

subsections.title: Neonatal Death Audit Consolidation Form
subsections.description: Audit tool for consolidating data on neonatal deaths.

subsections.title: Neonatal Referral Form
subsections.description: Form used to refer neonatal patients to other services or facilities.
